title: althaea micans
intro: Althaea micans, also known as marsh mallow or velvet leaf, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation in the body. The health benefits of althaea micans include relief from digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and skin conditions like eczema and acne. Althaea micans can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
